{{CargoRelic
|name=Anti-Death Mask
|class_id=20959
|rank=Green
|affct=FAME
|source=
|description=It emits an unsettling cold light. The mask is engraved with strange runes that seem to tell of life's tenacity and death's emptiness. The wearer will feel a power that transcends life and death, capable of resisting the assault of death and granting a chance of rebirth when on the brink of demise. However, this comes at a cost, as prolonged use may lead to an obsession with death, colloquially known as a death wish.
|fame=34
|art=12
|fth=18
|civ=13
|tech=13
|ss1=Lifesteal Rate +1%<br>Healing +1%
|ss2=Lifesteal Rate +2%<br>Healing +2%
|ss3=Lifesteal Rate +3%<br>Healing +3%
|ss4=Lifesteal Rate +3%<br>Healing +3%
|ss7=Lifesteal Rate +3%<br>Healing +3%<br> (Awakened)
}}
